posts.author: HenryFleming (Henry Fleming)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The native ‘deals’ column in our contacts board shows all deals linked to contacts regardless of the business that deal is also linked to.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d like to be able to have deals link directly to accounts, rather than to contacts so that where we have multiple accounts linked to contacts the deals stay where they should be and don’t appear in other accounts
